headline: Backrooms is a certified blockbuster with a $38 million opening day
summary: The 'Backrooms' film earned $38 million on its opening Friday. It's projected to hit $90 million for its opening weekend. This obliterates A24's previous opening record.

headline: Welcome to Night Vale host Cecil Baldwin shares his tech pet peeves
summary: Cecil Baldwin, host of 'Welcome to Night Vale,' shared his personal tech frustrations. Baldwin is also known for his roles in Gravity Falls and other projects. His popular podcast blends macabre horror with absurdist humor.

headline: Microsoft is threatening legal action for disclosing exploits
summary: Microsoft is facing criticism for its handling of zero-day exploits. An individual named 'Nightmare Eclipse' is publicly feuding with the company and posting exploit code. Microsoft is reportedly threatening legal action against these disclosures.

headline: Two of our favorite art TVs are more than 40 percent off this weekend
summary: Woot is offering significant discounts on Samsung Frame and Hisense CanvasTVs. These popular 'art TVs' are over 40% off through June 26th. The 65-inch Hisense CanvasTV is at its best price of the year.

headline: Stop Killing Games Gains Momentum After Bill Passes California State Assembly Vote
summary: The 'Stop Killing Games' movement has reached a major milestone. A bill protecting games from being pulled offline passed the California State Assembly. This legislation aims to preserve digital game access for players.

headline: 10 Fantasy Audiobooks That Will Magically Transport You to Another World
summary: Discover a curated list of 10 highly recommended fantasy audiobooks. These titles promise to magically transport listeners to immersive new worlds. Find your next enchanting adventure through sound.

headline: Everything Coming to Disney+ in June 2026
summary: Disney+ is set to release a variety of new content in June 2026. While no new MCU or Star Wars content is announced, other additions are coming. Subscribers can look forward to a fresh lineup of shows and movies.

headline: A Minecraft Movie 2 Gets Official Title Ahead of July 2027 Premiere
summary: The sequel to the 'Minecraft Movie' has received its official title. The cast revealed the new title: 'A Minecraft Movie Squared.' The film is scheduled for a July 2027 premiere.

headline: US, UK and Australia to develop underwater drone technology
summary: The US, UK, and Australia will jointly develop new underwater drone technology. This initiative falls under the Aukus military pact. The technology aims to protect undersea cables and enhance naval defense capabilities.

headline: Palace was handed Andrew's controversial envoy emails six years ago
summary: Thousands of emails detailing Prince Andrew's financial dealings were given to the Royal Household. The disclosure of these controversial emails occurred in 2020. This raises questions about the Palace's prior knowledge of the information.

headline: 'No-one feels safe now': Residents of Romanian city hit by drone share fears
summary: Residents of a Romanian city hit by a drone are returning to check their homes. Many express profound fear and insecurity following the attack. The drone strike occurred early Friday morning, causing distress and damage.

headline: Arrive three hours before flight home, airline boss tells UK holidaymakers
summary: Wizz Air CEO advises UK holidaymakers to arrive three hours early for flights home. Passengers are encouraged to carry portable chargers and water. This advice aims to mitigate issues from potential lengthy airport queues.
